howToUse.title: How to make a collage
howToUse.subtitle: No tutorials needed. Open the app, pick photos, and you're done.

steps.title: Pick photos
steps.description: Choose 2–10 images. Long-press and drag to reorder — slot numbers follow your order.

steps.title: Style it
steps.description: Swap layouts, pick a canvas shape, apply filters, add text, and drop in Zuli Monsters.

steps.title: Save or share
steps.description: Export to your gallery, Instagram, WhatsApp, or as a transparent sticker.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about Zuli Collage features, privacy, and Premium.

items.question: What is Zuli Collage?
items.answer: Zuli Collage is a photo collage maker for iOS (Android coming soon). Select 2–10 photos, pick a layout, style with filters and stickers, then save or share — usually in under 30 seconds.

items.question: Where can I download Zuli Collage?
items.answer: Zuli Collage is free on the App Store for iPhone and iPad. Google Play for Android is coming soon.

items.question: Do I need an account?
items.answer: No. Zuli Collage works entirely on your device. There is no sign-up, login, or cloud storage of your photos.

items.question: How many photos can I use?
items.answer: Between 2 and 10 photos per collage. Layouts automatically match your photo count.

items.question: What are Zuli Monsters?
items.answer: 48 original sticker characters created and owned by Zuki Apps. Use them in collages or install packs for WhatsApp and iMessage. Zuli Monsters™, including all character designs, names, and artwork, are the exclusive intellectual property of Zuki Apps. All rights reserved.

items.question: What is Layout Studio?
items.answer: A tool to design custom collage layouts: drag numbered slots, resize them, pick shapes, name the layout, and reuse it in future collages.

items.question: Are my photos uploaded to your servers?
items.answer: No. All image processing happens on your device. Photos are never uploaded to Zuki Apps servers.

items.question: What does Zuli Collage Premium include?
items.answer: Premium is a one-time purchase: no ads, no watermark on exports, high-resolution export, transparent PNG sticker export, and batch save from history.

items.question: Which languages are supported?
items.answer: English and Hebrew, with full right-to-left (RTL) UI mirroring in Hebrew.

items.question: How do I reorder photos?
items.answer: On the picker screen, long-press and drag thumbnails. Numbers on the layout preview match photo order (1 = first photo).

items.question: Why is there a watermark on exports?
items.answer: The free tier adds a small Zuli Collage watermark. Zuli Collage Premium removes it with a one-time purchase.

items.question: How do I add Zuli Monsters to WhatsApp?
items.answer: From the app home, open Zuli Monsters → Add to WhatsApp → confirm in WhatsApp.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: Email us and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How Zuli Collage handles your data

q1.question: How do I reorder photos?
q1.answer: On the picker screen, long-press a thumbnail and drag it to a new position. Layout slot numbers follow thumbnail order.

q2.question: How do I zoom a photo inside its cell?
q2.answer: In the editor, tap a photo cell to select it, then pinch to zoom or drag to pan inside that slot.

q3.question: Why is there a watermark on exports?
q3.answer: The free tier adds a small Zuli Collage watermark. Zuli Collage Premium removes it with a one-time purchase.

q4.question: Premium didn't activate after purchase
q4.answer: Open Settings → Restore purchases. Use the same Apple ID or Google account you used to buy.

q5.question: How do I add Zuli Monsters to WhatsApp?
q5.answer: From the app home, open Zuli Monsters → Add to WhatsApp → confirm in WhatsApp.

q6.question: Where can I read the full FAQ?
q6.answer: See the FAQ on the Zuli Collage product page or read public/zuli-collage/faq.md on zukiapps.com for answer-engine friendly copy.

additionalHelp.title: Need more help?
additionalHelp.description: If you could not find an answer, email zuki.apps.dev@gmail.com. We typically respond within 24–48 hours.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for Zuli Collage — on-device photo collage app; local processing, no cloud upload of your photos, optional Premium purchase.
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Zuki Apps (“we”, “us”) handles information when you use the Zuli Collage mobile application and related pages at zukiapps.com/zuli-collage (the “Service”). Zuli Collage is a photo collage app that processes your images on your device. We do not require an account to use the core app.

section1.title: 1. Who we are
section1.content: The data controller for Zuli Collage is Zuki Apps. Contact details are at the end of this Policy.
section1.content2: This Policy applies to the Zuli Collage app (iOS and Android) and the legal pages we publish for the product. Third-party app stores have their own policies.

section2.title: 2. Information we collect
section2.content: Zuli Collage is designed to minimize data collection. Depending on how you use the app, we may process:
items: Photos and videos you select from your device to create collages — processed locally on your device and not uploaded to our servers for core editing.
Collage projects and export history stored locally on your device (for example, recent collages kept in app history).
Optional in-app purchase status (for example, Premium / remove watermark) processed by Apple App Store or Google Play billing systems.
Support communications if you email us.
Limited diagnostic data if we enable crash or analytics tools in a future update; we will update this Policy before doing so.

section3.title: 3. How we use your information
items: Provide collage editing, layouts, filters, stickers, save, and share features
Remember your language preference and local settings
Process optional Premium purchases through the app stores
Improve stability and fix bugs when diagnostic tools are enabled
section3.content2: We do not sell your personal information. Zuli Collage does not include third-party advertising in version 1.0.0.

section4.title: 4. Permissions
section4.content: The app may request access to your photo library or camera (if you choose to capture photos) solely to let you select images for collages. You can revoke permissions in your device settings. Zuli Collage does not access your photos when you are not using those features.

section5.title: 5. Storage and retention
section5.content: Collages and edits are stored on your device. You can delete individual items from history or uninstall the app to remove local data. We do not operate a cloud account for Zuli Collage in version 1.0.0.
section5.content2: If you contact support, we retain correspondence as long as needed to resolve your request and for reasonable business records.

section6.title: 6. Purchases
section6.content: Optional Premium features (such as removing the export watermark) are sold as a one-time in-app purchase through Apple or Google. Payment and purchase history are handled by the store; we receive only what the store provides to confirm entitlement.

section7.title: 7. Sharing with third parties
section7.content: We do not share your photos with third parties for marketing. When you use the system share sheet, exports go to apps you choose (Messages, WhatsApp, Files, etc.) under their policies.
section7.content2: We use Apple and Google only as needed for distribution, billing, and platform services.

section8.title: 8. Your rights and children
section8.content: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or object to certain processing. Contact us to exercise rights. We may need to verify your identity.
section8.content2: Zuli Collage is not directed to children under 13 (or the minimum age in your country). We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.

section9.title: 9. Changes
section9.content: We may update this Policy from time to time. We will post the revised version with a new “Last updated” date. Continued use after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated Policy.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.metaDescription: Terms of Use for Zuli Collage — photo collage app, Zuli Monsters intellectual property, Premium purchase, and acceptable use.
terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Use carefully before using Zuli Collage. By downloading, installing, or using the app, you agree to these Terms and our Privacy Policy.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: These Terms govern your use of Zuli Collage — Photo Collage Maker (“Service”, “App”) operated by Zuki Apps (“we”, “us”). If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
section1.content2: If you use the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have authority to bind that organization.

section2.title: 2. Description of Service
section2.content: Zuli Collage lets you create photo collages on your device. The Service includes:
items: Automatic layouts and manual styling (borders, filters)
Save and share collages via the system share sheet
Optional Zuli Monsters stickers and sticker pack export
Optional one-time Premium purchase to remove the export watermark

section3.title: 3. Your photos and content
section3.content: You retain ownership of photos and other content you import. You are responsible for having the rights to use that content in collages you create and share.
section3.content2: Do not use Zuli Collage to create or distribute unlawful, infringing, harassing, or harmful content.

section4.title: 4. Intellectual property
section4.content: Zuli Collage and the Zuli Monsters characters, names, sticker artwork, icons, and related assets are owned by Zuki Apps and protected by copyright and applicable trademark laws.
section4.content2: You may use stickers and characters only as provided through the app for personal, non-commercial messaging and collages. You may not copy, redistribute, sell, or create derivative works from these assets outside the app without written permission from Zuki Apps.

section5.title: 5. Premium and purchases
section5.content: Optional Premium (remove watermark) is a one-time in-app purchase billed by Apple or Google. Refunds follow the store’s policies. Features and pricing may change with notice where required.

section6.title: 6. Acceptable use
items: Reverse engineer or attempt to extract source code except as permitted by law
Use the Service to violate law or third-party rights
Overload or disrupt the app or related systems

section7.title: 7. Disclaimers and liability
section7.content: The Service is provided “as is” without warranties of any kind to the extent permitted by law. Collage results depend on your photos and device; we do not guarantee uninterrupted operation.
section7.content2: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Zuki Apps is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service. Some jurisdictions do not allow certain limitations; your rights may vary.

section8.title: 8. Termination
section8.content: You may stop using the Service at any time by uninstalling the app. We may suspend or discontinue the Service or these Terms where permitted by law.

section9.title: 9. Changes and governing law
section9.content: We may update these Terms. Material changes will be posted with a new “Last updated” date. Continued use constitutes acceptance.
section9.content2: These Terms are governed by the laws of Israel, without regard to conflict-of-law rules, except where mandatory consumer protections in your country apply.
